title: Ore UI Expanded
description: Enhance your Minecraft Java Edition UI with a polished and modern touch inspired by the sleek Bedrock Ore UI
body:
OreUI Expanded is a resource pack for Minecraft Java Edition, transforming your UI elements into the familiar style of Minecraft Bedrock Edition. Enjoy a seamless blend of design aesthetics, bringing a fresh look to your in-game interfaces. Upgrade your Minecraft experience with the simplicity and elegance of OreUI Expanded.

---
